templates.name: Brand Identity / Rebrand
templates.description: For pitching brand identity, visual refresh, or rebrand projects

required_questions: What's the trigger for the rebrand — merger, new leadership, repositioning, growth, or something else?
Which brand elements are in scope — logo only, full identity system, guidelines, collateral rollout?
Is there an existing brand book or visual identity we should reference or depart from?
Who are their top 3 competitors visually? What do they admire or want to avoid?
Any sacred cows — elements they absolutely want to keep?
optional_questions: How many sub-brands or product brands need to be considered?
Is naming in scope or is the name fixed?
Do they need environment graphics or packaging as part of this?

cost_model.pricing_anchor_text: Frame against revenue impact of stronger brand recognition. Studies show branded companies grow 3-4× faster. Compare total investment against a single year's marketing spend.

narrative.letter_opening_instruction: Start with the client's current brand perception problem — what's not working and why. Reference a specific competitor who's executing their brand better. Position the rebrand as a strategic weapon, not a cosmetic exercise.

templates.name: Website / Digital Platform
templates.description: For pitching website redesigns, app design, microsites, or digital platform projects

required_questions: What's wrong with the current site/platform — design, performance, conversion, CMS, or all of the above?
What's the page count and content volume? Do they have content ready or does it need to be created?
Do they need CMS, e-commerce, integrations with existing systems, or a custom build?
Who's the target audience and what's the primary action they should take on the site?
Is this design-only or design + development?
optional_questions: What's their current tech stack?
Do they need ongoing maintenance after launch?
Are there accessibility or compliance requirements?

cost_model.pricing_anchor_text: Compare against cost of building an internal team (designer + developer × N months) vs. our fixed-price delivery with defined scope and timeline.

narrative.letter_opening_instruction: Open with a specific observation about their current website — a performance issue, a UX problem, a missed conversion opportunity, or a competitor doing it better. Show you've looked at their site before writing a word.

templates.name: Corporate Campaign — Anniversary / Milestone
templates.description: For pitching anniversary campaigns, milestone celebrations, large-scale IC campaigns

required_questions: What's the milestone — anniversary, founding, IPO, acquisition, or other?
Is this internal-facing, external-facing, or both?
What channels are in scope — email, intranet, social, events, press, OOH?
Is there a flagship event planned?
Are there existing brand guidelines we need to work within?
optional_questions: How many offices/locations need to be involved?
Is there a CEO message or leadership involvement expected?
Do they want merchandise?

cost_model.pricing_anchor_text: Frame as year-long partnership, not project fee. Show monthly equivalent. Compare against hiring 4-6 separate specialist agencies (branding + video + event + digital + social + PR).

narrative.letter_opening_instruction: Open with the client's origin story — when they were founded, what the world looked like then, what they've built since. Make them feel the weight of the milestone before talking about how to celebrate it.

templates.name: Creative Retainer / Ongoing Design Support
templates.description: For pitching monthly or annual creative retainers — ongoing design, content, and communications support

required_questions: What ongoing creative needs do they have — design, content, video, social, all of the above?
How are they currently handling this — in-house team, freelancers, another agency, or ad hoc?
What's the volume — roughly how many deliverables per month?
What's the pain — inconsistency, speed, quality, cost, or management overhead?
optional_questions: Do they need a dedicated team or on-call access?
Are there seasonal peaks (annual report, events season)?
Do they have existing templates and brand guidelines?

cost_model.pricing_anchor_text: Compare monthly retainer against hourly cost of equivalent freelancer hours (3 freelancers × 40 hrs/month × avg rate) or internal headcount (salary + benefits + management overhead + tools).

narrative.letter_opening_instruction: Start with their current frustration — the friction of managing multiple freelancers, the inconsistency of ad-hoc commissioning, or the overload on their internal team. Position the retainer as peace of mind and consistency, not just a service.

templates.name: Film & Video Production
templates.description: For pitching corporate films, brand films, docu-series, video campaigns, or animation projects

required_questions: What's the purpose of the video — brand awareness, internal comms, product launch, training, social?
What style — live action, animation, motion graphics, documentary, or hybrid?
What length and how many videos?
Where will it be distributed — social, website, internal, broadcast, events?
optional_questions: Do they have existing footage or photography we can use?
Is professional talent (actors, voiceover) needed?
Do they need multiple language versions?

cost_model.pricing_anchor_text: Position against published Indian video production benchmarks. Emphasise end-to-end service (concept through delivery) vs. production-house model (shoot only).

narrative.letter_opening_instruction: Open with what their current video presence is missing — or with a specific competitor's video that's outperforming them. Position video as the highest-ROI content format (cite engagement data).

templates.name: Employer Branding & Internal Communications
templates.description: For pitching employer brand development, internal comms design, HR communications, or employee engagement programmes

required_questions: What's the objective — employer brand from scratch, EVP refresh, internal comms overhaul, or engagement programme?
What's the employee population size and geographic spread?
What channels do they use for internal comms — intranet, Teams, Slack, email, physical?
What's the current pain — talent attraction, retention, culture alignment, or comms inconsistency?
optional_questions: Do they have an existing EVP or employer brand?
Is there a careers page or recruitment collateral we should audit?
Are there specific campaigns coming up (townhalls, awards, festivals)?

cost_model.pricing_anchor_text: Frame against cost of employee turnover. If the average replacement cost is 6-9 months' salary and employer branding reduces attrition by even 5%, the ROI is immediate.

narrative.letter_opening_instruction: Open with the talent market reality — competition for good people, the cost of attrition, the importance of culture as a differentiator. Reference their Glassdoor rating or a specific talent challenge in their industry.

templates.name: Experiences by Veeville — Experiential Learning
templates.description: For pitching Veeville's proprietary experiential learning programmes: Action Experience, Dudeldopp, Write Brain, Aislempix, Brown Box

required_questions: What's the business challenge they're trying to solve — innovation, collaboration, leadership, communication, team cohesion?
Who's the audience — leadership team, mid-management, cross-functional teams, new joiners?
How many participants?
What's the format preference — half-day, full-day, multi-day?
optional_questions: Have they done experiential learning before? What worked/didn't?
Is this a one-off or a series across the organisation?
Do they need pre/post assessment of outcomes?

benchmark_queries: design thinking workshop cost per day

cost_model.pricing_anchor_text: Frame against cost of a single bad decision from a misaligned leadership team, or against the productivity loss from poor cross-functional collaboration. One programme that shifts team dynamics pays for itself within a quarter.

narrative.letter_opening_instruction: Open with the business challenge, not the workshop. Don't sell a 'team building day' — sell the outcome: better decisions, faster innovation, stronger collaboration. Reference the specific programme that fits their need by name.

templates.name: Exhibition / Environment Design
templates.description: For pitching trade show booths, office branding, campus graphics, retail environments, or installations

required_questions: What's the space — trade show booth, office, campus, retail, museum, pop-up?
What's the square footage or booth size?
Is this design-only or do you need production/fabrication coordination?
What's the event or occupancy date?
optional_questions: Do they have existing brand guidelines for the space?
Is there a sustainability requirement for materials?
Do they need wayfinding/signage as part of this?

cost_model.pricing_anchor_text: Position against typical Indian exhibition/environment design agency rates. Emphasise that design fees are separate from fabrication/production costs (which are at actuals).

narrative.letter_opening_instruction: Open with the impact of physical space on brand perception. Reference research on how workspace design affects productivity, or how booth design affects lead generation at trade shows.
